transcript: Customer: This is an emergency, my outlet keeps tripping the breaker and it's getting bad! This is Mark Henderson at 9 Lakeview Drive. Dispatcher: Okay Mark, stay calm. I'm getting a technician dispatched to 9 Lakeview Drive right now. Customer: Please hurry. Dispatcher: A tech is on the way, they'll call you when they're close.

expected_entities.issue: emergency: outlet keeps tripping the breaker
